_comment: Copy this file to config.json and edit as needed. All fields are optional — any you omit will use the built-in default.
annotation_goal: study for a law school exam
_comment_language_depth: language_depth: vocabulary sophistication of annotations. 1 = simplest everyday language, 5 = advanced expert-level terminology.
_comment_discovery: discovery_sample_pages: how many pages to sample for Phase 1 category discovery. 0 = all pages (default).
